title: Whaaaaats behind Doors of Guf number 2 cue lights
display_title: Whaaaaats behind Doors of Guf number 2 cue lights
wikitext:
[]: Whaaaaats behind Doors of Guf number 2!? [cue lights]             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Tue Oct 22, 2013 9:44 am The answer: Pfft, I dunno. Let's have a look. Here's one of two times we clearly (as in freaking barely!) see what it is. Hmm... Messing with the brightness and contrast show us this... thing. Lots of crosses and seemingly, while lost in the detail here, some kind of sphere like structure inside it. The Chamber of Guf itself? When the Fourth Impact is averted by... someone, somehow... we get this shot of the Doors closing. It's a bit dark though. Ahh, much better. I'm sure I could do a less awful job when I get the Blu-Ray, but in the mean time, we have this. So is it Guf itself? A seed of life? A "moon"?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Oct 22, 2013 10:05 am There is already a topic about the Impacts were the weird things behind the Door of Guf was discussed, although your images could be an handy addition. Go right [s] here [/s]. [See this post . Keep posting in this topic. - Monk]

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Tue Oct 22, 2013 10:47 am IMO I think that the object is "space ship" that Gendo and Kozo were using at the end of Q.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Oct 22, 2013 11:16 am http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ovum That's what I think it's supposed to be (hey, look at what Wunder really is...)

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Oct 22, 2013 6:38 pm UrsusArctos wrote: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ovum That's what I think it's supposed to be (hey, look at what Wunder really is...)

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Oct 22, 2013 7:40 pm ElMariachi wrote: There is already a topic about the Impacts were the weird things behind the Door of Guf was discussed, although your images could be an handy addition. Go right here .

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Wed Oct 23, 2013 6:09 pm Kendrix wrote: Personally, I find something inherently scaey about the fact that something can be glimpsed beyond the "doors" at all... It's like realizing that something horrible but impossible might in fact be real.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Oct 24, 2013 2:40 am Kendrix wrote: Personally, I find something inherently scaey about the fact that something can be glimpsed beyond the "doors" at all... It's like realizing that something horrible but impossible might in fact be real.

[]: Re: Whaaaaats behind Doors of Guf number 2!? [cue lights]             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Sun Nov 10, 2013 2:52 am Th3Marauder wrote: The answer: Pfft, I dunno. Let's have a look. Here's one of two times we clearly (as in freaking barely!) see what it is. Hmm... Messing with the brightness and contrast show us this... thing. Lots of crosses and seemingly, while lost in the detail here, some kind of sphere like structure inside it. The Chamber of Guf itself? When the Fourth Impact is averted by... someone, somehow... we get this shot of the Doors closing. It's a bit dark though. Ahh, much better. I'm sure I could do a less awful job when I get the Blu-Ray, but in the mean time, we have this. So is it Guf itself? A seed of life? A "moon"?

[]: Re: Whaaaaats behind Doors of Guf number 2!? [cue lights]             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 10, 2013 3:32 am wiser3754 wrote: the DOOR WAS NEVER OPENED AT N3I OR MENTIONED BY RITSUKO DURING N3I's BEGGINING!! Answer that Kaworu!

[]: Re: Whaaaaats behind Doors of Guf number 2!? [cue lights]             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Sun Nov 10, 2013 4:37 am Reichu wrote: It's mentioned in the 2.0 storyboards as "Door of Balal", apparently revised to "Door of Guf" as of 3.0. I wouldn't assume a conspiracy theory just yet. (Also note that according to these same storyboards, what's considered the "Door" is the black space, not the rings around it.)

[]: Re: Whaaaaats behind Doors of Guf number 2!? [cue lights]             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Nov 10, 2013 6:23 am wiser3754 wrote: Then please explain why a sphere and four crosses appear at both 2nd and 4th Impact inflicting far greater damage to the world next to Shinji's 20 sec+ party trick?

[]: Re: Whaaaaats behind Doors of Guf number 2!? [cue lights]             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 10, 2013 7:19 am wiser3754 wrote: Then please explain why a sphere and four crosses appear at both 2nd and 4th Impact inflicting far greater damage to the world next to Shinji's 20 sec+ party trick?

[]: Re: Whaaaaats behind Doors of Guf number 2!? [cue lights]             Quote Post by Alpha » Sun Nov 10, 2013 8:33 am Reichu wrote: I dunno, lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Nov 10, 2013 9:13 am Possibly the Door that is opened each time is considered a different Door, hence the differences in effect each one produces? That might explain the differences between the "doors" seen at 3I, 4I, and the door-like vortex at 2I and the Eva-04 test site.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Nov 10, 2013 9:24 am Rob Ford

[]: Re: Whaaaaats behind Doors of Guf number 2!? [cue lights]             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Nov 10, 2013 9:33 am Reichu wrote: I dunno, lol.

[]: Re: Whaaaaats behind Doors of Guf number 2!? [cue lights]             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 10, 2013 10:04 am Alpha wrote: ... So Doors of Confusion?

[]: Re: Whaaaaats behind Doors of Guf number 2!? [cue lights]             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Nov 10, 2013 10:31 am Reichu wrote: But supposedly Shinji had no idea that a giant, impossible-to-miss black void opened up over Eva-01's head, so, unless he actually knew about that all along and is just feigning ignorance, the "flashback" clips do not represent Shinji's "viewpoint" in any way, but are instead there for the audience's benefit, to illustrate what Kaworu is ostensibly talking about.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 10, 2013 10:56 am Actually taking the dialogue into account, I don't see a problem. {Kaworu} Ikari Shinji-kun, {Kaworu} once Awakened , Eva-01 opened the Door of Guf {Kaworu} and became the trigger for Third Impact. {Kaworu} Lilin call it Near Third Impact . Kaworu specifies "once awakened" (ichido mezame shi) and that he is referring to Near Third Impact, hence the flashback visuals match up. The only enigmatic part is how Eva-01 became the trigger for Third Impact proper as a result of the aborted N3I.
